title: Add review endpoint via use case
author: eval-bot

context_units.body_new:
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends

from application.use_cases.get_review import GetReviewUseCase
from api.dependencies.container import get_review_use_case

router = APIRouter()


@router.get("/reviews/{review_id}")
async def get_review(review_id: str, use_case: GetReviewUseCase = Depends(get_review_use_case)):
    return await use_case.execute(review_id)
